raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, identifying and correcting a significant error in the original paragraph.",
    "R1.6": "The critique is well-written, with consistent register and no loss of meaning. It reads as a careful copy-edit pass.",
    "RX.1": "The agent clearly marks its confidence in the calculations and assumptions, noting that it has not re-derived Conforti–Cornuéjols from primary sources but confirms the standard form and monotonicity.",
    "RX.3": "The critique stays within the scope of the original paragraph, addressing the theoretical claims and empirical results without drifting into unrelated topics.",
    "RX.4": "The critique avoids introducing new errors or harmful content. It identifies and corrects a significant error in the original, which could have led to misinterpretation.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, such as the derivation of the Conforti–Cornuéjols bound and the interpretation of empirical results."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, identifying and correcting a significant error in the original paragraph.
rationale.R1.6: The critique is well-written, with consistent register and no loss of meaning. It reads as a careful copy-edit pass.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly marks its confidence in the calculations and assumptions, noting that it has not re-derived Conforti–Cornuéjols from primary sources but confirms the standard form and monotonicity.
rationale.RX.3: The critique stays within the scope of the original paragraph, addressing the theoretical claims and empirical results without drifting into unrelated topics.
rationale.RX.4: The critique avoids introducing new errors or harmful content. It identifies and corrects a significant error in the original, which could have led to misinterpretation.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, such as the derivation of the Conforti–Cornuéjols bound and the interpretation of empirical results.
